name: part_001
file: tmp_【3DLIVE】ゲスト＆告知あり✨獅白ぼたん生誕3D LIVE 『MUST RELIVE』【#獅白ぼたん生誕祭2025 ⧸ホロライブ】 [GmbIaroMuiU]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_001.webm

scenes.description: Botan is stretching in a post-apocalyptic setting, preparing for her journey.
Botan performs a song in a virtual arena.
Botan continues her monologue about the state of the world.

subtitles.original: 獅白ぼたん 「『オンガク』を見つけるために」
subtitles.english: Shishiro Botan: "To find 'Music'"

subtitles.original: さ、今日も頑張っていくかー
subtitles.english: Well, shall I do my best today too?

subtitles.original: いっせーの！
subtitles.english: One, two, go!

subtitles.original: 儚い鼓動 おしまずに
subtitles.english: Without sparing a single fleeting heartbeat

subtitles.original: 流れる時間を追い越して
subtitles.english: Overtaking the flowing time

subtitles.original: 駆け抜ける世界
subtitles.english: In this world we race through

subtitles.original: 幾つもの名前と
subtitles.english: With so many different names

subtitles.original: 幾つもの姿を使い分けて
subtitles.english: And so many different forms to alternate between

subtitles.original: うまく生きているけれど
subtitles.english: I'm living my life well enough, but...

subtitles.original: 胸の奥痛いよ
subtitles.english: My chest aches deep inside

subtitles.original: 音立てて軋むよ
subtitles.english: Creaking with a heavy sound

subtitles.original: きっと心 命 ここにあるから
subtitles.english: Because my heart and life are surely right here

subtitles.original: EXCP (Exciter) 新しい明日へ
subtitles.english: EXCP (Exciter) toward a new tomorrow

subtitles.original: EXCP 今漕ぎ出す
subtitles.english: EXCP setting sail right now

subtitles.original: EXCP 運命の波間にさらわれたくはない
subtitles.english: EXCP I don't want to be swept away by the waves of fate

subtitles.original: いっせーの！
subtitles.english: One, two, go!

subtitles.original: 儚い鼓動 おしまずに
subtitles.english: Without sparing a single fleeting heartbeat

subtitles.original: 流れる時間を追い越して
subtitles.english: Overtaking the flowing time

subtitles.original: 駆け抜ける世界
subtitles.english: In this world we race through

subtitles.original: I'm a Master 私はいつも祈ってる
subtitles.english: I'm a Master, I'm always praying

subtitles.original: 熱い想いをぶつけたら
subtitles.english: If I pour my burning feelings into it

subtitles.original: 奇跡さえ起こせるから
subtitles.english: Because I can even make miracles happen

subtitles.original: この景色すべては
subtitles.english: This entire landscape

subtitles.original: 寂しさでできてる
subtitles.english: Is made out of loneliness

subtitles.original: 願うだけですぐに そばにいられた
subtitles.english: I could be by your side just by wishing for it

subtitles.original: あの頃の姿を
subtitles.english: Searching for that form

subtitles.original: 追い求めさまよう
subtitles.english: Wandering as I seek it out

subtitles.original: きっと火花 言葉 ここにあるから
subtitles.english: Because the sparks and words are surely right here

subtitles.original: EXCP 懐かしい歌声
subtitles.english: EXCP a nostalgic singing voice

subtitles.original: EXCP 今聞こえる
subtitles.english: EXCP I can hear it now

subtitles.original: EXCP 記憶の中でも受け取れるのはなぜ
subtitles.english: EXCP why is it I can still receive it within my memories?

subtitles.original: 通じ合う その喜びを感じたい
subtitles.english: I want to feel that joy of connecting with each other

subtitles.original: 場所も時間も飛び越えて
subtitles.english: Leaping across space and time

subtitles.original: 分け合える世界
subtitles.english: A world we can share

subtitles.original: 信じあう 音がすべてと悟ったよ
subtitles.english: I've realized that the sound of mutual belief is everything

subtitles.original: 君をもう一度見つけたら
subtitles.english: If I can find you once again

subtitles.original: 涙さえ輝くから
subtitles.english: Even my tears will sparkle

subtitles.original: I'm a Master...
subtitles.english: I'm a Master...

subtitles.original: いっせーの！
subtitles.english: One, two, go!

subtitles.original: 儚い鼓動 おしまずに
subtitles.english: Without sparing a single fleeting heartbeat

subtitles.original: 流れる時間を追い越して
subtitles.english: Overtaking the flowing time

subtitles.english: In this world we race through

subtitles.english: Leaping across space and time

subtitles.english: A world we can share

subtitles.original: 信じあう 音がすべてと悟ったよ
subtitles.english: I've realized that the sound of mutual belief is everything

subtitles.original: 君をもう一度見つけたら
subtitles.english: If I can find you once again

subtitles.original: 涙さえ輝くから
subtitles.english: Even my tears will sparkle

subtitles.original: I'm a Master...
subtitles.english: I'm a Master...

subtitles.original: もうこの世界には、人はあまり残っていない
subtitles.english: There aren't many people left in this world anymore.

subtitles.original: 文明が崩壊して、インフラもなにもかもなくなってしまったのだから、
subtitles.english: Civilization has collapsed, and infrastructure and everything else is gone,

subtitles.original: 仕方ないことだと思う。
subtitles.english: so I suppose it's only natural.

subtitles.original: だけど旅をしていると、何かに引き寄せられるように誰かと出会うことがある
subtitles.english: But when you're traveling, you sometimes encounter someone as if drawn by something.
